reasoning: Circle publicly filed its S-1 on April 1, 2025, for a listing on the NYSE under 'CRCL.' While a stock market slump related to new tariffs in early April caused rumors that Circle (and others like Klarna) were postponing their IPOs, Circle proceeded to file an amended S-1/A on April 18, 2025. A subsequent report on April 21 cited plans to proceed with a 'formal IPO by June.' With an active S-1/A and ~6.5 weeks remaining until the July 1 deadline, there is a strong probability they will start their roadshow in late May or early June and list. The primary risk is a prolonged SEC review or another broad market freeze. I estimate the probability of listing before July 1 at ~77%.
